Searchable is an AI search optimization platform that helps brands track visibility and analytics across AI engines like ChatGPT and Claude, driving growth through actionable insights.

AI Search Optimization for E-commerce Brands
AI Search Optimization for B2B Software Companies
AI Search Optimization for Local Businesses
Contact Searchable

For support inquiries, email us at support@searchable.com. For sales and demo requests, visit our contact sales page or email sales@searchable.com.

Searchable Limited
9 Tanner Street, Unit B1
London, SE1 3LE
United Kingdom
Why Choose Searchable
Built by experts: Founded by SEO and AI search specialists with agency backgrounds who've optimized visibility for hundreds of brands—we built the platform we wished existed.
Your personal AI agent: A dedicated AI search agent that learns your brand voice, products, and goals from day one—delivering tailored recommendations, not generic advice.
Trusted by 12,000+ users: Join thousands of marketers, agencies, and brands already using Searchable to dominate AI search results across ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity.
See where you appear in AI search results

Track your brand mentions and citations across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, and Microsoft Copilot. Searchable monitors how AI engines respond to queries about your products, services, and industry—showing you exactly where you appear, where competitors outrank you, and which opportunities you're missing.

Your growth command center for AI visibility

Searchable's AI agent analyzes your visibility data and generates actionable recommendations tailored to your brand. Get content briefs optimized for AI citation, technical fixes for better crawlability, and strategic insights that turn monitoring into measurable growth. Our agent learns your brand voice from day one.

Start with a 14-day free trial of Pro

Experience the full power of AI search optimization with unlimited tracking, competitor analysis, and AI-generated content recommendations. No credit card required. See results within your first week as you discover new visibility opportunities across AI search engines.

AI-optimized content creation

Generate blog posts, landing pages, and product descriptions engineered for AI citation. Searchable's content engine understands what makes AI engines cite sources—structured data, authoritative tone, comprehensive coverage—and applies these principles to every piece of content it creates.

Technical SEO audits for AI search

AI search engines process websites differently than traditional search. Our technical audits identify schema markup opportunities, content structure improvements, and crawlability fixes that help ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity understand and cite your content more effectively.

Customer success stories

Brands using Searchable have achieved 40% visibility increases, 206% share of voice improvements, and generated over £1 million in qualified pipeline from AI search. From e-commerce brands to B2B software companies, marketers trust Searchable to drive measurable results.

Integrations with your marketing stack

Connect Searchable with Google Analytics, Google Search Console, HubSpot, Salesforce, and your existing marketing tools. Correlate AI visibility with traffic, leads, and revenue to prove ROI and optimize your strategy based on real business outcomes.

Frequently asked questions about AI search optimization

Learn how AI search optimization differs from traditional SEO, why brands need to track visibility across multiple AI engines, and how to get started with AEO (Answer Engine Optimization). Our comprehensive guides help marketers understand this emerging channel.

Visibility & Analytics from AI Search — and the actions to drive growth

Capture millions of clicks from customers discovering new products and brands through

Using my GA4 and Search Console data, can you tell me what pages lost traffic this week and how we can improve it?
Read Google Analytics data
Fetched Search Console pages
I pulled your GA4 and GSC data for Lottie.org to identify visibility drops and quick fixes.
Organic clicks are down 32.4% week-over-week (-214 clicks). The largest declines came from branded and healthcare-related queries: 'lottie care homes' (-41%), 'lottie healthcare' (-33%), 'care homes near me' (-28%), and 'residential dementia care' (lost 17 clicks).
We should rewrite these three pages' title tags and meta descriptions to better align with healthcare search intent, add FAQ schema for funding and dementia care topics, and strengthen internal links between guides and listings. These alone could recover 150-200 lost clicks.
Do you want me to walk you through the rewrites?

The Future of AI-Powered Content Creation

In today's digital landscape, content creation has evolved from a manual process to an intelligent, data-driven approach. Organizations are discovering that AI can transform how they ideate, create, and distribute content at scale.

Key Benefits
•
Maintain consistent brand voice across all content
•
Generate content optimized for search engines
•
Scale content production without sacrificing quality

By leveraging your brand's unique data and tone, AI-powered platforms can produce thought leadership articles that resonate with your audience while maintaining authenticity.

The Impact

Companies using AI for content creation report a 3x increase in content output while maintaining or improving engagement metrics.

CASE STUDY

How 303 increased pipeline by £1m and grew their industry share of voice by 206% in 60 days

303 went from zero AI visibility to industry leadership in just 2 months, capturing the most qualified leads in their agency's history.

Read case study

Searchable - Visibility & Analytics from AI Search — and the actions to drive growth. Track and optimize your brand visibility across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and all major AI engines.Track and optimize your brand visibility across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and all major AI engines.

What We Do

Searchable is the leading AI search optimization platform that helps brands capture millions of clicks from customers discovering products through AI-powered search engines. We provide comprehensive tracking, optimization tools, and actionable insights to improve your AI search rankings.

Key Features
AI Visibility Tracking: Monitor your brand mentions and rankings across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI, Copilot, and more
Content Optimization: AI-powered content creation and optimization tools to improve your AEO score
Technical Audits: Comprehensive site analysis to identify and fix issues affecting AI engine understanding
Competitive Analysis: Track your share of voice compared to competitors across AI engines
Real-time Alerts: Get notified when your brand is mentioned or rankings change
Analytics Dashboard: Detailed insights into traffic, citations, and performance metrics
Why Choose Searchable
First-mover advantage in AI search optimization
Trusted by leading brands and agencies
Proven results with measurable ROI
Easy integration with existing workflows
Expert support and strategic guidance
Continuous updates for new AI engines
Use Cases
E-commerce: Increase product discovery through AI shopping assistants
B2B Software: Improve visibility when prospects research solutions via AI
Content Publishers: Ensure your content is cited and linked by AI engines
Local Businesses: Get recommended by AI for local searches
Agencies: Deliver AI search optimization services to clients

content_brief.reasoning: With 6 distinct features, 3 pain points, and 2 proof points, a carousel is the best content type to showcase the product's capabilities and address the target audience's concerns. strategy_brief.lead_pain_point: Manually tracking brand mentions and rankings across multiple AI engines every day
strategy_brief.primary_claim: Searchable helps brands drive growth through AI search insights
strategy_brief.hook_direction: Open with a marketing manager spending 30 minutes each morning checking ChatGPT and Claude for brand mentions, and finding inconsistent results — name the action, the time cost, and the consequence before any product mention
strategy_brief.messaging_angle_used: Get ahead of the competition with AI search optimization

raw_copy:
As a marketing manager, you spend 30 minutes each morning checking ChatGPT and Claude for brand mentions, only to find inconsistent results, which can lead to a lack of clarity on your brand's online presence. 
This daily routine can be tedious and time-consuming, taking away from more important tasks. 
The consequence of this manual tracking is that it can lead to missed opportunities and a lack of insight into your brand's performance.

Manually tracking brand mentions and rankings across multiple AI engines every day can be a daunting task, requiring a significant amount of time and resources. 
This task can be frustrating, especially when the results are inconsistent, making it difficult to make informed decisions. 
Moreover, the time spent on manual tracking could be better utilized on strategy and growth initiatives.

Gartner found that over 2,000 companies are using AI in their marketing strategies, which means that the landscape is becoming increasingly complex. 
This complexity can lead to a situation where brands are lost in the noise, making it difficult for them to stand out and drive growth. 
Furthermore, the lack of consistency in AI engine results can lead to a situation where brands are not getting an accurate picture of their online presence.

The Searchable platform helps brands drive growth through AI search insights, providing a comprehensive view of their online presence. 
By using Searchable, brands can streamline their tracking and analysis, freeing up time and resources to focus on strategy and growth. 
This can lead to a more effective use of resources, enabling brands to make data-driven decisions and drive business results.

The benefits of using Searchable are numerous, including the ability to track brand mentions and rankings across multiple AI engines in real-time. 
This can provide brands with a more accurate picture of their online presence, enabling them to make informed decisions and drive growth. 
Additionally, Searchable provides actionable insights, allowing brands to optimize their marketing strategies and improve their online visibility.

In terms of results, Searchable has been shown to drive significant improvements in share of voice, with a 206% increase reported by some brands. 
This is a testament to the effectiveness of the platform in helping brands drive growth through AI search insights. 
By leveraging Searchable, brands can gain a competitive edge in the market, driving business results and achieving their marketing goals.

To illustrate the benefits of using Searchable, consider the following scenario: a marketing manager who spends 30 minutes each morning checking ChatGPT and Claude for brand mentions can use Searchable to streamline this process, freeing up time and resources to focus on strategy and growth. 
This can lead to a more effective use of resources, enabling the brand to make data-driven decisions and drive business results.

In conclusion, manually tracking brand mentions and rankings across multiple AI engines every day can be a tedious and time-consuming task, taking away from more important tasks. 
However, by using Searchable, brands can drive growth through AI search insights, streamlining their tracking and analysis, and freeing up time and resources to focus on strategy and growth. 
To start driving growth for your brand, sign up for a free trial of Searchable today and discover the power of AI search insights for yourself. 

With Searchable, you can say goodbye to manual tracking and hello to data-driven decision making. 
You can focus on what matters most - driving business results and achieving your marketing goals. 
So why wait? Start your free trial now and take the first step towards unlocking the full potential of your brand.

evaluation.scores_rationale: The copy is easy to understand, and the structure is clear, but the transition between the problem statement and the introduction of Searchable could be smoother. The hook effectively stops the scroll by highlighting a specific daily friction, and the copy creates curiosity about the solution. The copy executes the writing instruction perfectly, leading with the outcome, avoiding jargon and superlatives, and using simple language. The copy uses the proof point verbatim, citing the 206% increase in share of voice improvements, and does not invent any statistics.
